label: Arrive_at_Dragon_Rest
description: Ship approaches the harbor on the island's north side

label: Reach_Shipyard
description: Sailors row the party ashore at the rickety dock

label: Explore_Climbing_Path
description: Path winds up the cliffside to the temple with carved doorways

label: Discover_Open_Air_Temple
description: Towering statue of a wizened man surrounded by seven songbirds revealed

label: Curious Inquiry
description: Kobolds barrage the party with questions upon their arrival.

label: Combat Against Zombies
description: Characters fight zombies at the beach, prompting Elder Runara's shift from indifference to friendship.

label: Revelation of True Identity
description: Residents of the cloister know Elder Runara's true identity as a bronze dragon but withhold this knowledge from visitors.

label: Social Interaction Change
description: Elder Runara's attitude shifts from indifference to hostility if characters harm residents, requiring reconciliation.

label: Tattoo Symbol Recognition
description: Character identifies the Gilded Gallows insignia on Tarak's tattoos after succeeding on an Intelligence (History) check.

label: Guardian Encounters
description: Myconid-guardians prevent access to mushroom groves, creating a quest challenge for the party.

label: Hostile Interaction
description: Tarak's demeanor shifts to hostility when questioned about his criminal past.

label: Ship_Crash_Discovery
description: Varnoth witnesses a ship altering its course and crashing into northern rocks

label: Pursuit
description: Zombies pursue fleeing residents of Dragon's Rest along the lower path

label: Dialogue_with_Tarak
description: Tarak informs the party about the myconids’ plight and assigns them a quest.

label: Quest_to_Recover_Mushrooms
description: The party is tasked with investigating the myconids and returning heart cap mushrooms.

label: Guardian_Encounter_Prep
description: Tarak warns of the fungal octopus guardian blocking access to the caves.

label: Potion_Delivery
description: Tarak gifts the party two Potions of Healing.

label: Scaling Difficulty Adjustment
description: Adjust combat challenges based on whether players completed earlier chapters

label: Exploration_of_Shipwrecks
description: Characters investigate other shipwrecks, uncovering zombies, giant octopuses, and other hazards.

label: Zombie_Encounter
description: Sailors animated by a talisman in Compass Rose's hold ambush intruders in submerged vessels.

label: Giant_Octopus_Danger
description: Sunken shipwrecks host colossal octopuses resembling spore servant octopuses.

label: Ghoul_Discovery
description: Hidden threats within wrecks include ghouls, undead remnants of lost crews.

label: Boarding Instructions
description: Characters learn about accessing the wreck via rowboat or underwater entrance

label: Destruction of Clifftop Observatory
description: Runara battles her blue dragon rival, destroying the observatory.

label: Aidron's Confrontation with Sparkrender
description: Aidron meets Sparkrender and engages in combat, ultimately being captured.

label: Imprisonment of Aidron
description: Sparkrender imprisons Aidron in the observatory ruins.

label: Ritual Preparation
description: Sparkrender begins planning a ritual to summon the spirits of dead dragons, requiring Aidron's sacrifice.

label: Travel Options Description
description: Describes three methods to reach the Clifftop Observatory via boat, coastal walk, or overland path

label: Description
description: Text describes a path leading to the cliff edge and an overlook marked by golden-marble dragon statues

label: Combat_with_Batlike_Creatures_and_Kobolds
description: Two winged kobolds fight desperately against six batlike creatures that swarm around them.

label: Activate_Energy_Bridge
description: Using the moonstone key activates the energy bridge across the 22-foot gap between the rotunda and spire.

label: Statue Alignment Puzzle
description: Rotating statues to match the Dragon of Dawn constellation unlocks a hidden staircase to the secret archive.

label: Staircase Closure Mechanism
description: Misaligning any statue triggers the staircase to rise, sealing the library compartment.

label: Treasure_Discovery
description: Characters collect Sparkrender's treasure including coins, gems, and personal effects

label: Discovery Of Magical Items
description: Character discovers +1 battleaxe or spell scroll of hold person after successful intelligence check

label: Detect Magic Revelation
description: Detect magic spell reveals location of hidden items without requiring ability check
